title: Refract system architecture record
summary: A supporting architecture view of the Refract implementation across the React workspace, FastAPI backend, database, vector store, and storage layers.

pageSections.title: Archive role
pageSections.markdown: Architecture diagrams are useful supporting documents, but they should not dominate the public-facing project story. Here they live in the archive, where they can still be consulted by someone who wants to understand implementation seams without forcing that level of detail into the first read.
